docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 11/01/17. AS TO DEFENDANT QUIROZ, CLAUDIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STACKWOOD, TERRANCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUIROZ, CLAUDIA $2,237.00 PRINCIPAL, $262.00 INTEREST, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,614.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,499.00 FILED BY STACKWOOD, TERRANCE AS TO DEFENDANT QUIROZ, CLAUDIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 - SERVED OCT-03-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT QUIROZ, CLAUDIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-03-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR STACKWOOD, TERRANCE ASSIGNED TO WYNNS, GEORGE S. DBA GOLDEN GATE ASSET RECOVERY
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $254.95 ACCRUED INTEREST, $90.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT QUIROZ, CLAUDIA
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE WYNNS, GEORGE S. DBA GOLDEN GATE ASSET RECOVERY AS TO DEFENDANT QUIROZ, CLAUDIA
